info.name: Global Sanctions & Company Verification API
info.description:
Screen individuals and entities against sanctions lists from US, EU, Canada, and Australia. Verify companies via GLEIF LEI, EU VAT (VIES), and financial registries across 40+ countries. Check regulatory enforcement actions from ESMA, FINRA, FDIC, and CNIL.

All data is sourced from official government registries in real-time.

Base URL: {{base_url}}
Authentication: X-API-Key header

Get your API key at: https://sip.myskillstore.dev

Related Apify Actors (no-code alternative):
- Sanctions Screening: https://apify.com/lentic_clockss/global-sanctions-screening
- Regulatory Compliance: https://apify.com/lentic_clockss/regulatory-compliance-search
- Company Search (40+ countries): https://apify.com/lentic_clockss/global-company-search

item.name: Discovery

request.description: Returns metadata for all data products your API key has access to, including product_id, display_name, category, country, record_count, and last_refreshed_at.
Get metadata and schema for the OFAC Specially Designated Nationals (SDN) list. Returns field definitions, record count, and last refresh timestamp.

item.description: Explore available sanctions, compliance, and company verification products.

item.description:
Screen individuals and entities against government sanctions lists. Covers OFAC (US), EU Financial Sanctions, Canada Autonomous Sanctions, and Australia ASIC banned registers.

Corresponds to Apify Actor: https://apify.com/lentic_clockss/global-sanctions-screening

Search France CNIL (data protection authority) enforcement actions and sanctions.

item.name: Company Verification
GLEIF LEI — Search by Company Name

request.description: Search the GLEIF Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) registry. Globally unique company identifiers used in financial transactions.

response.name: GLEIF — Apple Inc

originalRequest.description: Search the GLEIF Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) registry. Globally unique company identifiers used in financial transactions.

query.description: VAT number with country prefix (e.g. DE814468598, FR40303265045)

request.description: Validate EU VAT numbers via VIES (VAT Information Exchange System). Covers all 27 EU member states. 30M+ registered entities.

query.description: VAT number with country prefix (e.g. DE814468598, FR40303265045)

originalRequest.description: Validate EU VAT numbers via VIES (VAT Information Exchange System). Covers all 27 EU member states. 30M+ registered entities.

request.description: Search ECB Single Supervisory Mechanism (SSM) list. 2,300 banks under direct ECB supervision.

item.name: US SEC EDGAR — Search Company Filings

request.description: Search SEC EDGAR for public company filings (10-K, 10-Q, 8-K). Searchable by company name, ticker, or CIK.

item.description:
